\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5799 introduces Hamiltonian as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \mathcal{H}_{\text{coupling}} = \frac{L_{\oplus} \cdot L_{\text{gal}}}{|\mathbf{r}_{\oplus-\text{gal}}|^3} \left[1 + \frac{2GJ_{\text{gal}}}{c^2 r^3}\sin^2\theta\right] \end{equation}
